items.en: The programmer developed a new application.
The algorithm processes data efficiently.
The database must work without errors.
The software was updated.
Checking code quality is an important stage.
Network security protects against hackers.
Artificial intelligence learns from data.
Cloud storage keeps the data.
The interface must be user-friendly.
Programmers work in a team.
A cardiologist treats heart diseases.
The surgeon successfully completed the operation.
A pediatrician monitors children's health.
A neurologist studies the nervous system.
The dentist performed the tooth treatment procedure.

items.kk: Онколог қатерлі ісікті емдеу жоспарын жасады.
items.en: The oncologist created a plan to treat the malignant tumor.
The dermatologist diagnosed the skin disease.
The anesthesiologist administered medication before the operation.
The general practitioner conducted a general checkup.
The nurse took care of the patient.

items.kk: Ренессанс дәуірі өнерде адам бейнесін орталыққа қойды.
items.en: The Renaissance era placed the human figure at the center of art.

items.kk: Импрессионистер жарық пен түсті жаңаша бейнеледі.
items.en: The Impressionists depicted light and color in a new way.
Cubism broke down forms into geometric parts.
Surrealism explored the subconscious world.

items.kk: Абстрактілі өнер нақты бейнесіз сезімді жеткізеді.
items.en: Abstract art conveys feeling without concrete imagery.

items.kk: Барокко стилі сәнділік пен қозғалысқа бай.
items.en: The Baroque style is rich in ornamentation and movement.
Modernism rejected traditional forms.

items.kk: Суретші өз стилін жылдар бойы қалыптастырды.
items.en: The artist developed his own style over the years.
The museum preserves works from every era.
Art critics evaluated the new movement.
